properties.name: E. Bronson Ingram Studio Art Center
Rothschild College
properties.note: All buildings in this construction area have been demolished—Carmichael Towers West in 2019 and the Greek house in 2021 (using aerial imagery as of April 2022). The new dormitory being built is Rothschild College.

properties.name: Residential College C
properties.note: Carmichael Towers East was demolished in the summer of 2021. Waiting for updated aerial imagery. New building is yet to be given a formal name by Vanderbilt University (as of April 2022), but it's been referred to as Residential College C.
